mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with FEDFUNDS changes (Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0%, labor market deterioration signals severe economic contraction, causing immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 9.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns (out-of-sample accuracy < 52%).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices signal strengthening corporate output capacity, which translates to positive S&P 500 forward returns during expansionary phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases coincide with negative 20-day SPX returns in > 60% of expansionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect robust employment growth, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent week.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero predictive power for 5-day forward returns (Rank IC consistently near zero across rolling windows).

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index growth above 3.5% forces monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60-day returns in > 65% of periods following CPIAUCSL threshold breaches.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining real GDP growth and falling retail sales confirms weakening aggregate demand, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Concurrent declines in GDPC1 and RSAFS fail to predict negative 20-day returns (hit rate < 45%).

mechanism_narrative: Three consecutive monthly declines in industrial production confirm a supply-side contraction, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX yields positive 5-day returns in > 58% of instances following three consecutive INDPRO drops.
